titleStmt.title: SII 36.110: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 110. (A.R. No. 110 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged. Gift of eight kācus by two ladies for maintaining two lamps in the temple of Tirumāgāḷamuḍaiyār at Ambar in Ambar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu. The money was received by Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira Bhaṭṭan and six other śiva-brāhmaṇas of the temple, who held the right to work on 30 days cycle and agreed to maintain two lamps out of the interest accrued from the deposit.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. svastiśrī pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamātum maruviya kalai mātum Arumaṟai viti
neṟiyanaittun=taḻaippa varumuṟaiyurimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭit tiṅkaḷ � cotiviḷaṅka karuṅkalipaṭi ppa poruṅkatirāḻi puvivaḷartuṭanvara villavariraṭṭar mīnavar ciṅkaṇar pallavar mutaliyar pārttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpil maṇṇakam puṇarac cempon vīra ttup puvaṉamu
ḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟin=taruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tribhuvana [cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa]devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu tulānāyaṟ yum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum Uttiraṭṭātiyumānavanṟu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Amparuṭaiyār tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevakanmikaḷukku It te
var koyilil muppatu vaṭṭattu kāṇiuṭaiya civappirāmaṇaril kāśyapaṉ nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭanum kāśyapan periyān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānāna tillai nāyakapaṭṭanum kāśyapan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān cipoluran=teyanāna tevakaṉ cokka paṭṭanum kāśyapan Uyyaninṟāṭi periyān Amparnāyaka paṭṭanum Āttirayan periyā
nāna vīrakecurapaṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānāna caṅkara paṭṭaṉum nāṭa Anniyūruṭaiyān veḷān periyaṉāṉa viccātiranukkup pukka tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā ttamu vaitta can=tiviḷakku Onṟum Ivaḷ makaṉ ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān konum mākaḷātitanukkup pukka naṅkaitaru vaitta can=tiviḷakku
Onṟum Ākac can=tiviḷakku Iraṇṭum kuṭuttom nāṅkaḷ Upaiyamāka kaikoṇṭa kācu Eṭṭu Ikkācu Eṭṭil kācu Onṟukku tiṅkaḷaraikkāl cinna palicai polivatākavum poliyilicaikkum kācukkum Ivviḷakku Iraṇṭum cantirātittavaṟ cantiviḷakkerikka kaṭavomāka cammatittu Upaiyam paṇṇikuṭuttom Ivvanaivom ... §
Digital edition of SII 36.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
